title: RU translation for Modern Industrialization
description: Russian translations and text fixes for Modern Industrialization
body:
**EN:**
Russian translation of Modern Industrialization and addons to it.
Supported addons: Modern Industrialization Sound Addon , Modern Nuclearization .

**RU:**
Русский перевод Modern Industrialization и аддонов к нему
Подерживаемые аддоны: Modern Industrialization Sound Addon , Modern Nuclearization .
